name: com.bidscube.applovin.max
description: Bidscube ↔ AppLovin MAX adapter for Unity (com.bidscube.sdk companion). Ships Bidscube native mediation AARs and C# helpers (e.g. AppLovinMaxUnityReflection). Does NOT include AppLovin's proprietary MAX Unity SDK: add the official AppLovin MAX Unity plugin separately so MaxSdk appears at runtime.

samples.description: Example scenes and scripts demonstrating the Bidscube Unity SDK.
